key_points.text: NVIDIA is expanding production capacity in response to stronger-than-expected orders for AI accelerators, indicating robust demand that extends beyond the previously secured multi-year Blackwell GPU agreement

citation.quote: NVIDIA said it is expanding production capacity to meet stronger-than-expected orders for its AI accelerators

key_points.text: Management cited a robust backlog and reiterated confidence in sustained data-center growth through the year, with demand characterized as broad-based across both cloud and enterprise customers

citation.quote: citing a robust backlog and reiterating confidence in sustained data-center growth through the year. Management characterized demand as broad-based across cloud and enterprise customers
